Chris Sununu doesn't have the best interests of women or working families at heart - and that's why we MUST elect Molly Kelly governor to be the first line of defense in stopping Trump's anti-women agenda in New Hampshire.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I believe Dr. Christine Blasey Ford.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa873/34a064cc/f14a7d5/70d882c/2285855470/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend -- I believe Dr. Christine Blasey Ford. I believed her last week, I believed her yesterday, and I will continue to believe and to support survivors of sexual assault. This isn't about politics - it is about doing what is right. It is about removing the stigma of reporting. It's about working to build a system where no survivor is bullied into silence or afraid to seek justice. Instead of demanding survivors prove and relive their trauma - as Dr. Blasey Ford was forced to do on a national stage yesterday, as survivors are forced to do on college campuses and in workplaces and homes across our country every day - we must demand leaders who will work to build a culture of consent and of accountability. Until then, we are all guilty of continuing a vicious cycle of assault, silence, and shame. We are guilty of punishing survivors instead of perpetrators. Survivors deserve better. They deserve to be supported and heard. That's why I stand with Dr. Christine Blasey Ford - yesterday, today, and always. In solidarity, Stacey Abrams
---

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa873/34a064cc/f14a7d5/70d882d/2285855470/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa873/34a064cc/f14a7d5/70d882a/2285855470/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa873/34a064cc/f14a7d5/70d882b/2285855470/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: standing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Like many of you, I found Khizr Khan's floor speech at the 2016 Democratic National Convention -- about our country, its values, and what his son sacrificed to protect them -- to be immensely powerful
Friend, Like many of you, I found Khizr Khan's floor speech at the 2016 Democratic National Convention -- about our country, its values, and what his son sacrificed to protect them -- to be immensely powerful. I'm honored to have Mr. Khan's support. Like many of you, he wakes up every day concerned about our country's future and he is working so hard to make it better. **Like Mr. Khan said in his message -- I have a very important deadline coming up on Sunday, and I have another $5,721 to raise to meet my goal.** **[Please consider making a donation so I can reach my goal and win re-election, and so Democrats can win the House in November.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Khizr Khan Subject: standing up for what is right Friend, Too few of our elected leaders in Washington are willing to stand up for what is right. Republican leaders are attacking our health care and they are undermining our Constitution. They have failed to stand up to the president and hold his administration accountable. My name is Khizr Khan, and I am a Gold Star father. I am working to elect Democrats across the country who will stand up for what is right -- **and I am supporting Tom O 'Halleran because he is doing so every day in Congress, and he needs our help win re-election this fall.** [**Friend, will you help Tom win re-election with a donation today, ahead of his end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Sunday?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom has proven that he is an independent voice who will protect our constitutional values and always do the right thing for his constituents and for this great country -- even if it is not politically convenient. He is also the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, so he truly does need our support. **[Please make a donation to Tom's campaign, friend. ](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**This country is at a crossroads. It is up to Democrats to stand for our democracy and we must ensure that we elect true leaders like Tom in this important time. Thank you, Khizr Khan Gold Star Father | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ef0/1a8421e1/19a337b2e/49274396/942792418/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ef0/1a8421e1/19a337b2e/4927439b/942792418/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ef0/1a8421e1/19a337b2e/49274382/942792418/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleran?refcode=email_footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000"). Thanks for having Tom's back!

name: Steve Fitzer
subject: I'll be checking in the morning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
| | | | This is our first FEC report head-to-head against Gary Johnson, and missing it would spell major trouble for Martin...**_[If you haven't already, can you help us reach our goal before we have to report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+If+you+havenrsquot+already+can+you+help+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")_**

**Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:**

I face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet this Sunday.

This is the first and only quarterly FEC report I will file against Libertarian Gary Johnson before the election. Read more below on what progress could be lost if I'm defeated this year, or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grid and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate last month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico. **The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**[DONATE $29 NOW>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")**
**And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am fighting to protect them.** I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has Gary Johnson, Republicans, and super PACs worried.

**Sunday is the last quarterly FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the first time since Johnson challenged me. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't be caught off guard.**

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To report our strongest FEC numbers yet, our new budget goal is to raise $55,830 before our Sunday deadline. All this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme opponents defeats me in November. Will you contribute now and help us close our budget gap before we must publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180928_4_8")** Thank you for standing with me,

Martin

clean_body: | | | | This is our first FEC report head-to-head against Gary Johnson, and missing it would spell major trouble for Martin... "" Begin original message from Martin Heinrich: I face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet this Sunday. This is the first and only quarterly FEC report I will file against Libertarian Gary Johnson before the election. Read more below on what progress could be lost if I'm defeated this year, or, if you've heard enough: "" Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos. I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers. Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grid and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate last month. I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico. The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line. "" And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am fighting to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history. Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has Gary Johnson, Republicans, and super PACs worried. Sunday is the last quarterly FEC deadline before the election, and**afterwardsI will have to report my fundraising numbers for the first time since Johnson challenged me. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't be caught off guard. "" If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: "" "" ** "" "" Thank you for standing with me, Martin | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! Receive this email from a friend? "" Make sure to follow the campaign on "" and "" If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next, ""** We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. name: Paul Begala
subject: how we turn grassroots strength into a win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
There's been a lot of talk this year about Democrats' growing strength ahead of the midterm elections. But we can't just count on this edge becoming an automatic win in November.
| | Peter, There's been a lot of talk this year about Democrats' growing strength ahead of the midterm elections. Now, in my years in politics and my years working in the White House, I've seen elections come and go. And there is no doubt that we have the edge, with grassroots energy sky-high and polls showing that swing voters want new leaders. **But we can 't just count on this edge becoming an automatic win in November.** We have to work to turn our early grassroots strength into victory, and the way we'll do it -- _the way we 'll take back the House_ \-- is by supporting the amazing candidates we have running across the country. One such candidate is Abigail Spanberger -- an impressive former CIA officer who has built an incredible grassroots campaign here in Central Virginia. [**Peter, can you make a donation today, ahead of Abigail 's approaching end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, so we can turn this grassroots strength into a win?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wxy8roZBVZqyInWJRFTRakuE-qzbBBFkHtKkWZJP_bg=/rQiDyYQNMS51n-SdWqTWX18_NImZ17N1Jh17VphteSM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b1_pb_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This is a toss-up race. We will win the House in November in districts like this one, with candidates like Abigail, and she needs our support in this campaign's final stretch. [**Peter, chip in if you can -- you 'll make a difference.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wxy8roZBVZqyInWJRFTRakuE-qzbBBFkHtKkWZJP_bg=/rQiDyYQNMS51n-SdWqTWX18_NImZ17N1Jh17VphteSM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b1_pb_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Paul Begala [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wxy8roZBVZqyInWJRFTRakuE-qzbBBFkHtKkWZJP_bg=/rQiDyYQNMS51n-SdWqTWX18_NImZ17N1Jh17VphteSM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b1_pb_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wxy8roZBVZqyInWJRFTRakuE-qzbBBFkHtKkWZJP_bg=/rQiDyYQNMS51n-SdWqTWX18_NImZ17N1Jh17VphteSM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/wxy8roZBVZqyInWJRFTRakuE-qzbBBFkHtKkWZJP_bg=/IVSyk0gWtopov21bsHfK16gVnZ3wtceh6gm9O80OHIw=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

body:

| The radical left is completely out of control.

They attack Conservatives. They attack my family. They even came after my 98-year-old grandmother.

We need to fight against the radical left and their forceful attacks. And, we have to do it now.

**I’m authorizing all donations to be matched FIVE TIMES until midnight tonight to help Conservatives meet their critical FEC deadline and defeat the radical left.**

# _REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_
##
[**Confirm Brett Kavanaugh**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wall-street-journal-confirm-brett-kavanaugh/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) -_The Wall Street Journal_ “Judge Kavanaugh was right to call the confirmation process a ‘disgrace’ in his passionate self-defense,” The Wall Street Journal editorial board writes. Dr. Christine Blasey Ford’s “allegation should have been vetted privately, in confidence, as she said she would have preferred. Instead ranking Democrat Dianne Feinstein held it for six weeks and it was leaked—perhaps to cause precisely such a hearing circus.”
##
[**Consumer Confidence Rises to Highest Level in 18 Years**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-consumer-confidence-rises-highest-level-18-years/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) -CNBC “Consumer confidence rose in September, notching its highest level in about 18 years. The Conference Board’s index rose to 138.4 this month from 134.7 in August,” Fred Imbert reports. “Consumers’ assessment of current conditions remains extremely favorable, bolstered by a strong economy and robust job growth,” said Lynn Franco, the Conference Board’s director of economic indicators.
##
[**Trump Addresses U.N. General Assembly: We Choose ‘Independence’ Over ‘Global Governance’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://freebeacon.com/politics/trump-addresses-un-general-assembly-we-choose-independence-over-global-governance/) -_The Washington Free Beacon_ “President Donald Trump spoke about globalism and national sovereignty in a speech before the United Nations General Assembly on Tuesday,” Jeffrey Cimmino writes. “I honor the right of every nation in this room to pursue its own customs, beliefs and traditions. The United States will not tell you how to live, work or worship. We only ask that you honor our sovereignty in return,” the President said. [**Trump, at UN General Assembly, Signs Major Trade Deal with South Korea, Reveals Possible Kim Jong Un Meeting 'Soon'**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://www.foxnews.com/politics/2018/09/24/trump-at-un-general-assembly-signs-major-trade-deal-with-south-korea-reveals-possible-kim-jong-un-meeting-soon.html) -Fox News “President Trump and South Korean President Moon Jae-in signed a major agreement of Trump’s trade agenda Monday, on a busy day at the U.N. General Assembly,” Frank Miles reports. “This agreement will reduce bureaucracy and increase prosperity in both of our countries. Workers in South Korea and America will find new customers and new opportunities to expand and grow,” President Trump said. [**Trump to UN: ‘We Commit to Fighting the Drug Epidemic Together’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-delivers-remarks-united-nations-counter-narcotics-drugs-live-stream-2018-09-24/) -CBS News “President Trump vowed Monday to work with the United Nations and its member countries to fight drug trafficking and addiction across the globe,” CBS News reports. “U.N. Secretary-General António Guterres applauded Mr. Trump for ‘focusing a global spotlight on the world drug problem,’ adding, ‘we have never needed it more.’” [**Trump Health Chief: Premiums to Drop for Popular ACA Plan**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.usnews.com/news/best-states/tennessee/articles/2018-09-27/trump-health-chief-premiums-to-drop-for-popular-aca-plan) -_The Associated Press_ “Premiums for a popular type of ‘silver’ health plan under the Affordable Care Act will edge downward next year in most states, the Trump administration's health chief announced Thursday,” Ricardo Alonso-Zaldivar reports. “Azar's numbers were in line with a broader independent analysis earlier this month by Avalere Health and The Associated Press, which found premiums and markets stabilizing nationwide.” [**How Trump Rescued Our Economy from Obama’s ‘New Normal’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/26/how-trump-rescued-our-economy-from-obamas-new-normal/) -_The Daily Signal_ “It’s hard to believe that just two short years ago, our economy was limping along with no sign of a massive boom around the corner. Beyond any shadow of a doubt, the pivotal factor in the last two years has been President Donald Trump,” Michael Busler writes. “The real median income is set to hit a record level by the end of 2018.” [**Nikki Haley: John Kerry's Secret Talks with Iran are 'Anti-American'**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/nikki-haley-john-kerrys-secret-talks-with-iran-are-anti-american) -_Washington Examiner_ “U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley charged Wednesday that former Secretary of State John Kerry's ongoing talks with Iran are ‘anti-American,’” as they undermine U.S. diplomacy, Pete Kasperowicz reports. “What Secretary Kerry did was not only disrespectful, it was hurtful to America,” Ambassador Haley said.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI5Ljk1NTUyMTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyOS45NTU1MjE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyNTQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&110&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)

for Dan this evening, and we want to give you another shot to
contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can toward our FEC report
before we brief him on our progress.

Peter,

This Sunday is the final quarterly Federal Election
Commission (FEC) deadline of the midterm elections, which means
every candidate in the country has to lay down their cards and
show their opponents, the pundits, and the media their true
strength.

We are raising $10,000 to educate Illinois voters about our
opponent, Art Jones’ white nationalist beliefs.

We cannot afford to close our books on Sunday without
hitting our goal. Can you contribute $5, $10, or $20 right now to
help us get there by midnight Sunday? Click here.
( http://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-sep-fec-deadline?refcode=DS_EM_FR_90DO_180929_1_5&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Fighting for the truth
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501136153%2501100370%2b-%2b09-29-2018%2beNewsletter%250115419.11608040.4067195.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501136153%2501100370%2b-%2b09-29-2018%2beNewsletter%250115419.11608040.4067195.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **September 29, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | | This week we saw powerful testimony from a courageous Dr. Christine Blasey Ford--testimony that she knew would turn her life upside down, but that she felt compelled to give anyway because it was her civic duty to make sure the American people knew the truth. Thank you, Dr. Ford, for your strength and your honesty. Judge Kavanaugh's time before the Senate Judiciary Committee stood in sharp contrast. His opening comments--that the credible sexual assault allegations against him are an "orchestrated political hit" fueled by anger at President Trump and an attempt to get revenge for 2016--show his total disregard for Dr. Ford's anguished testimony. Did Democrats manufacture her awful experience? Did Democrats tell her to share her anguish with her therapist years ago? Facts matter--we didn't need to let it come to this. There should have been a full FBI investigation before the Senate Judiciary Committee voted on the Kavanaugh nomination. But Republicans were ready to cast aside the facts and move forward with the nomination at any cost. Fortunately, the voices of Americans across the country swayed Senator Flake to join with Democrats and call for an FBI investigation into all the credible allegations of abusive conduct made against Judge Kavanaugh. I support the effort to postpone any votes on the Senate floor until the FBI reports on these credible and deeply troubling allegations. Dr. Ford put the American people first by coming forward to tell her painful story when she had nothing to gain and everything to lose. Senate Republicans now need to do their civic duty, put politics aside, and show the same courage. The truth is nonpartisan. The American public spoke out, and it made a difference. But the fight is not over, and Marylanders must continue to voice their opinions. Chris Van Hollen
---
### The Tragedy in Harford County
Gun violence continues to plague Maryland's communities--from our city streets to mass-shooting incidents like what we experienced in Harford. My heart is with the families and victims of the tragedy in Perryman, and I'm grateful for the first responders who were on the scene in minutes. But words are not enough. We must do more to end the toll of gun violence in our communities. While there is no one answer--and no one thing will prevent all gun violence--there is more that we can do. I will continue working to urge Congress to implement thoughtful, common-sense solutions to gun violence.
### Fighting a Public Health Crisis
Earlier this month, the Senate passed the bipartisan Opioid Crisis Response Act, which will help support prevention, treatment, and recovery for individuals struggling with substance abuse and other mental health issues. But we need the resources to go with it--which is why I fought hard for Congress to allocate $3.8 billion in Fiscal Year 2019 to invest in agencies and programs that support this fight. But it's easy to get lost in the big numbers and complicated legislation--which is why it's so important to me to be on the ground talking to the people most impacted by this crisis. Earlier this month, I visited the Maryland House Detox--the first and only freestanding, 24/7 inpatient detox center in our state. I also hosted a Public Safety Forum in Hughesville, Maryland with officials from throughout Southern Maryland--including representatives from local governments, sheriffs' offices, fire departments, school systems, and faith leaders--to talk about what they're seeing on the ground and federal efforts to help. Hearing first-hand the impact of the opioid epidemic on our communities made it more clear than ever that we must do more to address this crisis. We won't stop until we've ended this scourge and addressed the terrible personal and economic toll that the opioid epidemic and substance abuse take on our communities.
### Supporting Maryland's First Responders
Earlier this month, I visited the Frostburg Fire Department--where I had the opportunity to meet with local department personnel and announce more than $3 million in funding to Allegany County from the Federal Emergency Management Agency's Assistance to Firefighters Grant Program. The funding will bolster emergency preparedness, provide new high-quality equipment and tools, and enhance efforts to provide adequate staffing throughout departments in the county. Every day, the firefighters and other emergency responders in Allegany County and across our state put their lives on the line to protect our communities. It's our job to ensure they have the tools they need to safely and effectively do just that. Touring the Frostburg Fire Department was a great way to see first-hand the work that our first responders do--and the importance of providing them with adequate funding and equipment. This year alone, we've been able to help secure $23,414,893 in funding for Maryland fire departments. I will continue working to provide Maryland's first responders with the resources they need to keep our communities safe.
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15419.11608040.4067195.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15419.11608040.4067195.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15419.11608040.4067195.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15419.11608040.4067195.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15419.11608040.4067195.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---

name: Anthony Pardal
subject: Fwd: So much is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| Friends and Neighbors -- Just wanted to make sure you saw Jeremy's email. Because of our amazing, dedicated supporters, we are getting closer to reaching our goal for the month of September! ** ** **With Election Day, November 6th, just around the corner, every dollar counts.** Every donation helps spread Jeremy's message to voters from the Panhandle to the Everglades: **as our next CFO, Jeremy will fight for everyday Floridians and build an innovation-centered economy, prioritizing entrepreneurial endeavors and job growth in Florida.** But we can't get there without your help. **[Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more by midnight tomorrow to help send Jeremy to the cabinet? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/9_bZS3cyVVeVNig17HIEEDFpOnJTlsAYa1p1jwRJg8A=/D4w5gATaRRLSCwd3U7pZHFmYi4ZhbkQTDLM-SEqbhLI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all you do, **Anthony** \- Anthony Pardal, Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO \---------- Forwarded message ---------- [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9_bZS3cyVVeVNig17HIEEDFpOnJTlsAYa1p1jwRJg8A=/8MV13ChFLV266dwwwqd7TPcESRW2lZY8_IYeb9xR5Jc=) The office of Florida Chief Financial Officer (CFO) may not make many headlines, **but the great responsibilities that come with it are of great consequence to _EVERY_ Floridian.** Here are just a few examples of the things the CFO is responsible for: \- Oversees the state accounting functions \- Oversight of the state auditing functions \- Oversight of the states unclaimed properties \- Monitors the investments of state funds \- Manages the deferred compensation program \- Manages the risk management program for the state \- Oversight of the Insurance Consumer Service \- Oversight of the insurance agents and agencies and responsible for insurance licensing \- Oversight of licensing and regulations for funeral homes and cemeteries \- Oversight of insurance fraud investigation \- Ensuring businesses have workers compensation coverage \- Assisting injured workers with benefits and re-employment \- Serves as the state fire marshal Additionally, the CFO -- along with the Governor, Attorney General, and the Agriculture Commissioner -- serves on the Florida Cabinet, which has the following roles and responsibilities in our state government: \- Governing the purchase of state lands \- Serve as the state Clemency Board \- Governing the purchase of state bonds \- Fiduciary trustee for the Florida Retirement System \- Oversight of the state Veterans' Affairs \- Oversight of State Law Enforcement \- Oversight of power plants and transmission line citings \- Financial and insurance regulation for the state [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/9_bZS3cyVVeVNig17HIEEDFpOnJTlsAYa1p1jwRJg8A=/D4w5gATaRRLSCwd3U7pZHFmYi4ZhbkQTDLM-SEqbhLI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Needless to say, the CFO has a lot to do with the direction our state government takes. They also serve as **an important check and balance to other parts of the Cabinet - including the Governor 's office, as well as the state government's interaction with the federal government.** These days, just watching the news should remind us of the great importance of checks and balances in government - and making sure our leaders are doing right by the people they were elected to serve _(you)_. We will have an important opportunity on November 6th. **And so very much is at stake.** As your next CFO,**making sure that your state government spends YOUR money wisely and transparently would be my top priority.** We have an election coming up in just six short weeks. **But we have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more by midnight Sunday, to help me bring checks and balances to the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9_bZS3cyVVeVNig17HIEEDFpOnJTlsAYa1p1jwRJg8A=/D4w5gATaRRLSCwd3U7pZHFmYi4ZhbkQTDLM-SEqbhLI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/9_bZS3cyVVeVNig17HIEEDFpOnJTlsAYa1p1jwRJg8A=/BQKX-IKs9TojDRg-g9yCb5HancgMnQjmeyG6YpTuKwU=).

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Values
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c1/9e00690/5f1a0cbc/2401d5a1/2709285988/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Growing up, my mom was a school bus driver and my dad was a construction worker. While we weren't the wealthiest family by any means, they taught me the importance of hard work. My grandmother, who didn't have a formal education herself, taught me the importance of getting my education.

These values drive me every single day.

I know we need to create jobs in Florida that pay a living wage for every family, no matter where they are on the income ladder. I know that everyone deserves access to affordable healthcare and a quality public education. I know that when people work together, anything is possible.

**[We will make Florida a state that works for everyone, but we've still got a tough journey ahead going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Ron DeSantis. So can you pitch in $5 to help me win this election?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c1/9e00690/5f1a0cbc/2401d5b9/2709285988/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-values-resend?gpsid=13_55_4055&refcode=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+We+will+make+Florida+a+state+that+works+")**

After Governor Rick Scott's eight years in office, we need fresh leadership and bold new ideas to rebuild our state and bring Floridians together again.

Thanks to folks like you, I'm more confident than ever that we can do it. Together.

**[So chip in $5 or more now and let's finish what we started.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c1/9e00690/5f1a0cbc/2401d5b8/2709285988/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-values-resend?gpsid=13_55_4055&refcode=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+So+chip+in++ask++or+more+now+and+lets+fi")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c1/9e00690/5f1a0cbc/2401d5bb/2709285988/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-values-resend?gpsid=13_55_4055&refcode=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c1/9e00690/5f1a0cbc/2401d5ba/2709285988/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36c1/9e00690/5f1a0cbc/2401d5bc/2709285988/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=14+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180930_values_resend_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")

---
Peter, **Running in a District that has been in Republican hands for seven terms, we must do more than motivate long-time Democrats. We must also identify new voters. **

Our volunteers and staff have registered hundreds of new TX-10 voters in recent months. And a couple weeks ago, we partnered with [Register2Vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2393371/13369759/1946995237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTE5MTZmNi0wOWM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zll9C5mImYLEaHiMbJnkr-VwMUFe1mrYZm4EbifY0J8=) on an innovative strategy. Using U.S. Postal Service Change of Address data, and matching it with Democratic voting history, **we have identified over 22,000 likely Democrats who moved to this District in recent years**. And we mailed them all voter registration packets! **[Donate today to expand the Democratic voting pool in the Texas 10th!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2393372/13369760/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTE5MTZmNi0wOWM0LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zll9C5mImYLEaHiMbJnkr-VwMUFe1mrYZm4EbifY0J8=)** Now, we are going to call and text these folks to urge them to register to vote before the October 9 deadline. Will you help us contact them?

name: Ryan Furlong
subject: BREAKING: Pro-Trump super PAC is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Just before Trump returns to Minnesota.

| We just got word below a pro-Trump PAC is dropping an ad buy into Minnesota against Tina starting October 1. **[We have to respond. Please pitch in $3 now before our FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180929AM_em&amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** Every poll is showing this race in the single digits, our Republican opponent has pledged to spend a million dollars on the airwaves against us, and now we're seeing Republican special interests drop into our race with dark money. **Republicans told the _Star Tribune_ , "If it looks like Minnesota [Senate race] can be close and a potential pickup, you'll see the cavalry coming."** Friend, they are here. And they are ready to do everything in their power to turn this seat red and hand Trump a victory -- and another rubber stamp for his agenda in the Senate. **We are still $10,205 short of our FEC end-of-quarter goal. Hitting this goal or falling short will determine whether we have the resources to respond to the dark money attacks headed our way over the next 38 days. Can you rush an urgent contribution of $3 or more before our deadline at midnight tomorrow?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$3 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d435/c1f7015/6cfe1b8e/11415ac1/3736244656/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180929AM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=3")

body:
|

| | | Hi there!

We haven't met yet, but I'm Martin's new deputy campaign manager, John.

When Gary Johnson got into the race last month, Martin and the team asked for your help raising additional funds so they could expand the campaign staff. You came though, and I'm glad to now be part of the team working to reelect Martin -- thank you!

**_[Now, I need to ask for your help once again. We're facing our most important FEC deadline this year, but we're only around halfway to our goal with less than 48 hours left. You can pitch in here to get us over the line >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Ben Jealous
subject: What Bernie taught me:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why we can't stop organizing.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37820a/7ab0e2c4/7e32866f/3498c03f/3564389698/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09298A") Friend, I know it's Saturday, and I hope you're having a restful one -- but I had to send you a quick note. I have always believed in the power of community organizing. I am no stranger to going door to door, talking to real people about the issues. But, on days like today, I think of my friend Bernie -- who showed me how this translates into building a grassroots political campaign. His dedication to organizing around progressive ideals helped fuel my passion even more to run for governor here in Maryland in 2018. So I'm lacing up my shoes to start organizing today, and that's what I'm planning to do every day until Election Day: get out to meet folks, talk about my plans for a stronger, safer, and greener Maryland, and make sure they're voting in November. **It's why this GOTV fund is so important** \-- because we have to equip our volunteers with the supplies they need to talk to voters, too, and to make sure our ad stays up on the airwaves across Maryland. [**So, before you head out the door this morning, I'm making the hard ask: We need to raise just $7,865 to meet our $25,000 GOTV fund goal. Will you donate $5 or more now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37820a/7ab0e2c4/7e32866f/3498c03f/3564389698/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09298A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37820a/7ab0e2c4/7e32866f/3498c03e/3564389698/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09298A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

Ben

We're coming up on our final end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day, and when our next finance report becomes public, everyone will be looking to see how strong Team Klobuchar is as we head into the final days of this campaign.

Senator Klobuchar is working hard for us, and now we need to have her back.

**Will you read Amy 's message, and then make a contribution to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal?**

name: Anne Holton
subject: Hello
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
We don't need divisiveness and nastiness, we don't need a rubber stamp for the president's agenda, and we sure don't need to be taken backwards in time. -----------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

Yesterday, Tim sent an email about the values that bring us together. When I saw it in my inbox (yes, I get his campaign emails just like you do), it got me thinking about the state of our politics these days, about Tim's opponent Corey Stewart, and about why we really do need Tim back in the Senate.

I went to the debate between Tim and Corey earlier this week, which means I had a front row seat to witness what Corey Stewart would bring to the Senate - and I can tell you that he is simply not what Virginians need. We don't need divisiveness and nastiness, we don't need a rubber stamp for the president's agenda, and we sure don't need to be taken backwards in time. But that's exactly what Tim's opponent wants. He's embraced all these extreme ideas that would hurt all of us, and the worst part is that he's done it _because he thinks it's what Virginians want to hear._ **Well as a Virginian, I'm here to tell him he's just plain wrong about us.[We're not buying what he's selling.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bbb/1832451351/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Were+not+buying+what+hes+selling&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ")**

Tim, on the other hand, talked about what he always talks about on the campaign trail - a Virginia that works for all. It's what he always talks about because it's what he's always believed. He believes in Virginia (and just as importantly, in Virginians), in the dignity of work and working people, and in opportunity for all - not just for some. It really is as simple as that.

**I think the choice is easy on[November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bba/1832451351/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ") _But that doesn't mean that this can be written off as an easy win._** Tim will be the first to tell you that he's not taking anything for granted - which means that he's got thousands upon thousands of voters to reach, and not much time left to do it.

**The reality is that reaching those voters takes resources - so today, I'm asking you to be a part of this effort one last time before the campaign's final public filing deadline, which is[Sunday at midnight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bb9/1832451351/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Sunday+at+midnight&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ") [Please click here to make an online contribution to Tim's voter outreach program.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bb8/1832451351/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Please+click+here+to+make+an+online+cont&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ")**

Thank you very much - Tim and I appreciate your support, and are so glad we're all in this together.

_Anne Holton_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bbf/1832451351/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ")
---

|
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bb3/1832451351/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1058/3e0906/71ced0d4/3e364bb2/1832451351/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ&source=20180929_1_FR_AH_Anne-EOQ")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. clean_body: We don't need divisiveness and nastiness, we don't need a rubber stamp for the president's agenda, and we sure don't need to be taken backwards in time. ----------------------------------------------- | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek - Yesterday, Tim sent an email about the values that bring us together. When I saw it in my inbox (yes, I get his campaign emails just like you do), it got me thinking about the state of our politics these days, about Tim's opponent Corey Stewart, and about why we really do need Tim back in the Senate. I went to the debate between Tim and Corey earlier this week, which means I had a front row seat to witness what Corey Stewart would bring to the Senate - and I can tell you that he is simply not what Virginians need. We don't need divisiveness and nastiness, we don't need a rubber stamp for the president's agenda, and we sure don't need to be taken backwards in time. But that's exactly what Tim's opponent wants. He's embraced all these extreme ideas that would hurt all of us, and the worst part is that he's done it because he thinks it's what Virginians want to hear. Well as a Virginian, I'm here to tell him he's just plain wrong about us. "" Tim, on the other hand, talked about what he always talks about on the campaign trail - a Virginia that works for all. It's what he always talks about because it's what he's always believed. He believes in Virginia (and just as importantly, in Virginians), in the dignity of work and working people, and in opportunity for all - not just for some. It really is as simple as that. I think the choice is easy on "" But that doesn't mean that this can be written off as an easy win. Tim will be the first to tell you that he's not taking anything for granted - which means that he's got thousands upon thousands of voters to reach, and not much time left to do it. The reality is that reaching those voters takes resources - so today, I'm asking you to be a part of this effort one last time before the campaign's final public filing deadline, which is "" "" Thank you very much - Tim and I appreciate your support, and are so glad we're all in this together. Anne Holton | "" * | "" "" ""

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: there's no way that's possible...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Judge Brett Kavanaugh could be confirmed despite credible accusations of sexual misconduct. The independence of Robert Mueller's investigation into the Trump-Russia connection is under attack. **You ever get tired of looking at the news headlines, shaking your head, and thinking _"there's no way that's possible"?_** Because I do. This is no time to start missing goals. We need to finish our plan so we can help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. [**We only have until Sunday to reach our most important FEC goal yet -- can you rush in a contribution?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb3/622b7b5b/1ce5badb/307b6bc4/623466169/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180929am?refcode=dwse180929am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Republicans have proven over and over that they are incapable of leading. They are, however, pretty good at destroying progress. Let's face it...we have a president dead-set on interfering in an investigation into his campaign. We have a Congress dead-set on ripping away health care, cutting Medicare, and doing untold damage to our families. **We have to put an end to this.** Republicans must be held accountable -- and we have to do it. _But we have to reach this FEC goal first._ [**24 hours may not seem like enough time to raise another $3,748, but for this team it's more than possible. Rush in a contribution today and help us get to this goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb3/622b7b5b/1ce5badb/307b6bc4/623466169/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180929am?refcode=dwse180929am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") I won't stop fighting until this country is back on track. Thanks for fighting beside me. Debbie
---

|
---

Friend,

We all see the news every day. And with Trump in the White House, there doesn't seem to be an end in sight to the scandals. But this week has been especially over the top.

People are scared, and rightfully so. Washington is in chaos with Republicans in control.

We need to keep focused and working towards our goal of making sure the people of New Jersey are taken care of. And the only way we do that is by re-electing Democratic Senator Bob Menendez and taking back the majority in Congress.

name: MATCH-ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: we can do this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e627d/51dbcc2a/123daea8/3abc272/1549252794/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") We won't sugarcoat it, team:

We didn't meet our $15,000 match goal before the deadline. Thankfully, our match donors are extending the deadline through the end of the fundraising quarter -- to midnight on Sunday. We need to take advantage of this because if we don't, the consequences could be devastating.

Ever since Bob voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, they've really stepped up their attacks. President Trump has smeared Bob on Twitter, at an NRA rally and right here in Pennsylvania. His campaign has already poured money into radio ads, and he won't stop until he replaces Bob with his good friend and longtime supporter Congressman Lou Barletta.

With attacks coming from the very top of the Republican establishment, this campaign needs to be prepared to fight back. But budgets are tight, and right now our advertising is on the chopping block. **That's why this match opportunity is so important: it's a chance for grassroots supporters to come together to make a game-changing investment to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat.**

We don't have much time before the match expires, and there is another $3,200 worth of match dollars to unlock. **Can you give $5 to support Bob right now? Every dollar will be doubled.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Sarah Neibart
subject: [important] weekend update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
Sorry to email you on a Saturday, but we’re excited about our campaign’s energy. Before we announced our campaign to take back New Jersey, Bob... | |
---
Peter,
Sorry to email you on a Saturday, but we’re excited about our campaign’s energy.

Before we announced our campaign to take back New Jersey, Bob Menendez’s seat was deemed “safe.”

We’ve cut his lead to a razor thin margin, and we’re on the verge of a MAJOR upset.

This is where we pull away and win on November 6.

Supporters around New Jersey have already stepped up to hit our quarterly goal and send Bob Menendez packing.

Can I count on you? We need to raise another $12,928 and have just one day left.

I believe in New Jersey’s future – the momentum is on our side to retire corrupt career politician Bob Menendez once and for all.

**[Quick donate $12>>](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=37250aaa59be40b7b8730c88e76cf30b&_e=hui7RB8-eiqF1am4dxZQRmyKR80ML9l5k9Lqbmj_YUUxxL-2db2IWZaES9DlmDPsP46TKTtcihBUHgVl7PxKDq6ak-9Ck-He70WXhqSRM5rYFgMA37fIsa136KYESmniujWE9mwBYTbBsNPfwFQn7GFGqfdDcXEXWbjV6QdjgMYhFyoHnZLRwZ3ImTDKymvPaUrIh1NMZNTevUmHdUqfXPVnf1ukWnFaFimgdgZBtz-pf0CKkYFuN2PE8WKMrJnZTTPsaj--lQl57XlFEqCqsTRJPpKSRA07zxOjEkoWNkLrHvAVGXiEjQjXjdo7A46HaSyMAcY6ThWpKlvsh4A6uv6Clbzx5Y513V2D26zpIzBhCJpdN-lMwOvjZ0-XP9KYkzHZsHljTFvrY4bgqdaxAysEh8mFnRRMn8wlRtV3OR-ptMIGgotliunoUbWMKOrk)**

There is still plenty of work to be done, and I’m not letting up until we achieve victory on November 6.

Now more than ever, President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence need a trusted Hoosier voice in Congress fighting for our priorities in the Sixth District and around the country.

Here’s the work we still have left to do.

We are up against a major moment in our campaign – **the September End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline.**

This is the final quarterly deadline before the election, and that’s why we’re setting a big goal.

Our goal is to raise **$30,000,** and we have to hit our target before September 30 at midnight.

I know it’s a big ask, but with the help of our supporters, I know we can do it.

As a former Marine, I’m always up for a challenge. Are you?

**[Stand with me for our conservative Hoosier values and ensure victory in November by donating any amount>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bbb498464a7d464aaf9860b18dddd6dc&_e=ewjr-O31vg5QZ406UgKJpVjFbYCzkViQeznc795jCMm7rQcE_Uxk35ActSZzqIcy4LHlG_D-W8Ksmf0xocjf-TZvQ8PbGHDjQP6Qbq_NnzGFD211CV2lMeyoqmH-0nmaWZvxxXD-Wl5p2ZgqRtgBCGFO9mTMJFyxhKX329rIVALUBnI6y6Nt5xL3KZfY9sJ70rS1U6MrHWneLaxOaunu2r6SFYKEA6CzauMRt4BTIsA6vdEk79AUEelV9HjNPDn2Znhaek-YAjSaVUfovfFNQSpMoPHCZIMBnvs5P29zc_3vIQ8cmNj5YasKz3kAUBFTxyaH4SYOkT3M77HUOERI-v-vYTUkQIomXCyCGZs3k3xgvf3qfbYHKVp6w8YjcxMwU-tMFkpOK_LtyTtn3WRDZHq4oQMqiCHecZY6T6Ibix0%3D)**

|
#
Peter -- **Here’s how Senator Mitch McConnell described our race: “like a knife fight in an alley; I mean, just a brawl...”** That came just days after McConnell’s Super PAC launched a **$1 MILLION** attack ad against Phil Bredesen, and just weeks after a Super PAC aligned with the Koch brothers launched a **$2 MILLION** attack ad against us. Both of these ads have been criticized for false claims, earning respective “**Mostly False** ” and “**False** ” ratings from the nonpartisan, Pulitzer Prize-winning PolitiFact. name: Chris King, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Mayor Andrew Gillum's vision is clear:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Friends,

As the first person from his family to graduate college, Mayor Andrew Gillum understands the struggle middle-class Floridians face in accessing affordable healthcare. He knows that just one illness can be financially devastating for far too many people in our state.

Now, to be fair, Ron DeSantis should know that too -- but it's clear that he just doesn't care. He's spent years in Congress not only opposing affordable healthcare, but actually voting to take it away from hundreds of thousands of Floridians.

Andrew's vision for Florida is clear -- make healthcare more affordable, protect Medicare for seniors, and protect Floridians with pre-existing conditions.

**[So please, take a minute to watch our new TV ad and then chip in $5 so we can share our vision with every voter in Florida.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d669/177265065/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=1+-+So+please+take+a+minute+to+watch+our+new")**

Bring it home,

Chris King
Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d668/177265065/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Andrew Gillum
Date: Wed, Sep 26, 2018 at 12:25 PM
Subject: This is a moral issue

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d66b/177265065/VEsF/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&source=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx")

Friends,

No one should ever be one illness away from bankruptcy. And the scariest part about getting sick shouldn't be trying to figure out how your family is going to pay for it -- but for too many Floridians that's the case.

I find the constant attacks on affordable healthcare insulting, both as someone who grew up in a working-class family that went to the free dental clinic whenever the time came and as someone with at least an ounce of human decency.

I believe that healthcare should be a right, not a privilege -- and everyone should have access to the care they need when they need it. That's why, as Governor, I will fight to make affordable healthcare a right for every Floridian -- but I need your help to make sure every voter knows it.

**[Watch our newest TV ad about how I plan to fight for affordable healthcare, then chip in $5 to help us make sure we can keep it on the air as long as possible.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d66a/177265065/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+Watch+our+newest+TV+ad+about+how+I+plan+")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d66d/177265065/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=5")
People's lives are at stake. And the constant threat of taking away affordable healthcare is a direct assault on the most vulnerable among us, our seniors, and the working and middle-class families of America. This isn't a political issue, it's a moral one -- but sadly, Ron DeSantis seems to disagree.

In Congress, DeSantis voted to cut guaranteed benefits for Medicare and to eliminate healthcare protections for people with pre-existing conditions, and he opposed expanding Medicaid, which would have provided affordable healthcare coverage to over 800,000 working Floridians.

It's clear DeSantis has the wrong priorities for Floridians and their healthcare -- which is why it's so important to make sure voters across the state know they have a candidate who will put them first.

**[Together, I know we can make healthcare affordable for all Floridians -- but I need your help to do it. Watch our new TV ad, then chip in $5 to keep it on the air.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d66c/177265065/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=6+-+Together+I+know+we+can+make+healthcare+a")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d66f/177265065/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=7+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ce/9e00690/5f6ee951/2401d66e/177265065/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180929_HC_ad1_kicker_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx"). name: Danny Glover
subject: Profound change is possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Like many of you, I happened to be born in the midst of a great movement in this country.
#
Friends,
The systems of oppression that stop Black, brown and white working families from pursuing a fair shot at a better life have been in place for decades. In order to tackle these systems and vote out the establishment politicians who uphold them, we need a revolutionary approach.
**Our Revolution is organizing from the bottom up to empower working families in communities across the country and around the world.** Neighbors, friends, and people from all walks of life are coming together to form local groups and elect a new generation of progressive leaders who demand racial, economic, and social equality, and fight for the issues that matter to all of us.
I am inspired by the work of Our Revolution - they are taking the organizing principles of political movements throughout history and transforming this country, one neighborhood at a time.
[**Will you contribute to Our Revolution's work? Your $5 supports their organizing efforts to engage directly with communities and revolutionize this country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8d8/bed43eb/716a7415/75fcd183/2147966135/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-glover?refcode=em180929-full&noskip=true")
Our future depends on the courageous actions of those willing to challenge the status quo and bend the arc of history toward justice. With more and more people galvanized to run for office, many for the first time, the political revolution is growing stronger. Progressive change has never been easy, and it never will be. But it is that quality that makes this movement all the more inspiring and our victories more monumental.
There has never been a time like today when such profound change is possible. With your support, we will seize this opportunity and create a political revolution.
In solidarity,
Danny Glover
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8d8/bed43eb/716a7415/75fcd183/2147966135/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-glover?refcode=em180929-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Friend,

While at times it can feel like everyone's against us, I want you to know that you're not in this fight alone.

**So today, I 'm going to write a check to help protect our majorities AND help my father win his re-election campaign in 2020.

And if you join me in making a contribution before our FINAL FEC deadline of the election (9/30 at 11:59 PM), it will be MATCHED. **

I'll be honest -- when I hear the vicious attacks hurled against my father, it's hard not to take them _personally._

But then I remember that he chose to walk away from his old life to enlist in this fight. I remember that he's given a voice to 63 million forgotten Americans.

He knew what he was getting into. _We all did_. We knew that draining the swamp would force us to see the ugliest monsters lurking at the bottom.

They launch witch hunts against innocent men. They attack Sarah Huckabee Sanders. They've even barricaded our Homeland Security Director's house because she's trying to end illegal immigration.

_That 's why I felt compelled to write to you today, and tell you that I'm making a contribution._

**[Join me in making a contribution before our FINAL FEC deadline on 9/30 at 11:59 PM -- and it will be MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=514133af493682d029e13fc8e6ee538da748953b0f54a8236dabb37726b006a53d62918f6dd54d30a2c5b08db762bd35dfc0baf440ad8ef0)**

subject: Reporters are already reaching out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Reporters are already reaching out to ask if I think we’re going to hit
our end-of-quarter goal. I really hope we will, but we haven’t yet.

Tomorrow, we’ll close out our final FEC fundraising quarter of this
campaign. This is the last time before the election that we’ll put out a
quarterly report on the campaign’s fundraising. Our opponents and the
press will be looking at how much we’ve raised, and how many supporters we
have on the books as a sign of our strength. A sign of what we’re able to
do across the state, on the air and on the ground. And a sign of whether
we have what it takes to pull off a historic victory on November 6.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1019&akid=13861%2E444211%2E4RPLCb ]Can you make your first
donation to Beto’s campaign right now before our critical
FEC deadline? Given how hard Beto has worked for us over the last two
years, we can’t slow down or fall short -- that’s why I need you to add
a contribution today.

[21]Beto for Texas

If we can reach this goal, we’ll send an incredibly powerful message to
everyone out there about the momentum behind Beto’s candidacy -- just
weeks out from the election. It’ll make the difference.

Thanks for chipping in.

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1020&akid=13861%2E444211%2E4RPLCb ]Contribute
