subject: Respond to our opponent’s false attack ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Why is Rep. Walorski spending millions of dollars running TV ads full of lies about Mel Hall?

Maybe she's afraid to face up to her own record in Congress. Our new ad asks why Rep. Walorski won't talk about her votes to take away health care or allow big internet companies to invade our privacy.

[**Watch our new ad now, then contribute $5 or whatever you can before tomorrow's FEC fundraising deadline to help us keep it on the air.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gM0zM_19pylGdnvuMeBiBMIqUjrBvo2_4C6-Bl47z6U=/x8Lj6jwx5xvNLAUoAj3UzJj2JDiWqOjOPx6-ekhYx6U=?refcode=em180929)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gM0zM_19pylGdnvuMeBiBMIqUjrBvo2_4C6-Bl47z6U=/rks-VPptQqyLqGDhpRl_5Bhj0_ua1UF9C1K9EaMdX7I=?refcode=em180929)

Is Rep. Walorski too busy catering to the corporate special interests, who've backed her with more than $3.2 million so far, to look Hoosiers in the eye and answer these simple questions?

We can't let Rep. Walorski keep avoiding the issues while corporate PACs bankroll millions of dollars of lies about Mel Hall. We've got to fight back and set the record straight.

**Chip in now so we can keep running our new ad and share the truth about Rep. Walorski 's record:**

name: Jessica Morse
subject: McClintock is failing women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MAzGIS33NEG5s_QFH_z8XB6O8E5OFvoDbl3a6GvlJVI=/IomHpCEgH-yD29cZP3sP3EgaDvXn6_8boC95MybxYBo=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180929_JM_20180929-eoq3_all_logo)
Peter,
After Dr. Ford's emotional testimony, I felt dismayed to hear politicians, including Tom McClintock, diminish her experience and question why she hadn't come forward 30 years ago.
When women do not come forward after suffering a life-altering crime, the question isn't "what's wrong with that woman?", the question is, "what's wrong with our justice system?"
**There is a clear solution --elect public servants who will work to fix the system instead of blaming survivors. **[_**Can you help with $25 or more today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MAzGIS33NEG5s_QFH_z8XB6O8E5OFvoDbl3a6GvlJVI=/-z2IQrubv2god41_x4T394Dkp6rcuUFsAmvB_N_DL-4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180929_JM_20180929-eoq3_all_l1)
In a recent recording, McClintock discredited Dr. Ford's testimony as "crazy talk" and questioned why it took her over 30 years to come forward. "That doesn't pass the smell test for me."
McClintock said, "The story itself seems to be missing some very, very important credible evidence." He also dismissed the calls for an FBI investigation and concluded "they don't have anything to investigate."
A third of women experience sexual assault and 60 percent of these assaults go unreported, but Congressman McClintock is still questioning Dr. Ford's credibility. Something is clearly wrong.
Congressman McClintock isn't working to change these laws, but I will. We must:
* Remove the statute of limitations on sexual assault
* Institute universal rape kit testing and a national database so serial rapists can be apprehended
* Improve and normalize education about consent

[_**Help me get to Congress today, because women deserve to have justice after a crime is committed and we deserve to have the confidence that our system will deliver justice against criminals, not character assassination against survivors.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MAzGIS33NEG5s_QFH_z8XB6O8E5OFvoDbl3a6GvlJVI=/-z2IQrubv2god41_x4T394Dkp6rcuUFsAmvB_N_DL-4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180929_JM_20180929-eoq3_all_l2)
I need your support and help to do this,
Jessica

clean_body: Peter, After Dr. Ford's emotional testimony, I felt dismayed to hear politicians, including Tom McClintock, diminish her experience and question why she hadn't come forward 30 years ago. When women do not come forward after suffering a life-altering crime, the question isn't "what's wrong with that woman?", the question is, "what's wrong with our justice system?" There is a clear solution --elect public servants who will work to fix the system instead of blaming survivors. In a recent recording, McClintock discredited Dr. Ford's testimony as "crazy talk" and questioned why it took her over 30 years to come forward. "That doesn't pass the smell test for me." McClintock said, "The story itself seems to be missing some very, very important credible evidence." He also dismissed the calls for an FBI investigation and concluded "they don't have anything to investigate." A third of women experience sexual assault and 60 percent of these assaults go unreported, but Congressman McClintock is still questioning Dr. Ford's credibility. Something is clearly wrong. Congressman McClintock isn't working to change these laws, but I will. We must: Remove the statute of limitations on sexual assault Institute universal rape kit testing and a national database so serial rapists can be apprehended * Improve and normalize education about consent I need your support and help to do this, Jessica Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: values we share
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TlxO9XDWDzm4uqJc3MBtBJH5HiNAB-MFj2bbniTG_Do=/Yu6V75YWZbfvsxMVqgQ3id6XAJCJNp77gmJZs7hsi38=?refcode=welcome2018peggy&amount=25)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to tell you how proud I am to be part of Tim's campaign and to be working to elect him as our next governor. I've known Tim for more than a decade, and I'm honored to be his running mate. We're going to make a great team for Minnesota.

I'm the daughter of a single mother, who didn't have a lot growing up. Now, I could be the highest-ranking Native woman office holder in American history. I've seen how anything is possible when we come together as One Minnesota, and I'm determined to build a state that offers opportunity, hope, and a chance for all kids to get ahead.

But enough about me. This campaign isn't about me. It's not even about Tim. It's about all of you -- the people of Minnesota. It's about the values we all share: tolerance, respect, kindness, and coming together to fight for those values in the face of great threats to our democracy.

[**Will you contribute to help us fight for our values this election?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TlxO9XDWDzm4uqJc3MBtBJH5HiNAB-MFj2bbniTG_Do=/Yu6V75YWZbfvsxMVqgQ3id6XAJCJNp77gmJZs7hsi38=?refcode=welcome2018peggy&amount=25)

As someone who's spent a large part of my career training people to be leaders, I can recognize when someone has the potential to be a great one. Tim gets it. He understands what's going on in the lives of Minnesotans, and he's in politics because he wants to make a difference.

The state Tim and I envision is one where all Minnesotans have paid family leave, affordable child care, and access to early childhood education. Where our air is breathable and our water is drinkable.

[**If that 's the kind of Minnesota you'd like to see too, will you chip in to make sure we have the resources to keep making progress in St. Paul?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TlxO9XDWDzm4uqJc3MBtBJH5HiNAB-MFj2bbniTG_Do=/Yu6V75YWZbfvsxMVqgQ3id6XAJCJNp77gmJZs7hsi38=?refcode=welcome2018peggy&amount=25)

Miigwech (Ojibwe for thank you),

Peggy

P.S. The Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program will refund residents up to $50 per individual or $100 per married couple.

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TlxO9XDWDzm4uqJc3MBtBJH5HiNAB-MFj2bbniTG_Do=/Yu6V75YWZbfvsxMVqgQ3id6XAJCJNp77gmJZs7hsi38=?refcode=welcome2018peggy&amount=25)

We’re SO close, friend, but if we don’t stand together now, Harder and his radical allies will CRUSH our Valley values. Really appreciate it, friend. Jeff \-----Forwarded Message Below----- FINAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE End of Quarter: September 30 | Friend, Liberals are desperate to take over California and it's never been more clear. This month, Josh Harder even campaigned with President Obama promising a blue wave. Do you know what a blue wave would mean to Valley families? Nothing good! Harder and his radical allies have made it clear that they have only a few priorities. Repealing tax reform, impeaching President Trump, and making Nancy Pelosi the next Speaker of the House. And the scary part is... if we can’t fight back, they might just be able to do it. They’re raising record funds and their progressive candidates are stomping on Republicans across the country. If we want to protect Valley families, we have to step in NOW and make sure we reach fundraising deadlines. ESPECIALLY ones like this one: it’s our official END OF QUARTER deadline -- the last one of this entire race. As of right now, we’re just $27,823 short of our goals and I know we can make it if we all chip in. But we only have until midnight on September 30th to do it. Can you chip in to help us get there? Friend, please remember... liberals have laid out their out of touch plans already and if they win, they’ll definitely follow through! Fighting back now is crucial to protecting our tax cuts, our jobs, and our families. I hope you’ll join me by stepping up today and making this a great FINAL END OF QUARTER: With only weeks left until Election Day, we don't have any time to waste. Sincerely, Jeff Paid for by Denham for Congress

name: Bob (personal)
subject: September
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e627e/51dbcc2a/123c35b6/3abc346/3796448604/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team:

I spent a lot of time on the campaign trail this month talking about justice. It's what every Pennsylvanian deserves from their government, but there isn't any justice coming out of Washington right now.

The Trump administration has robbed working families by passing a corporate tax cut, by outsourcing their Supreme Court nomination in a corrupt bargain with special interests and by repeatedly voting to take away their health care. Republicans in Washington -- and that includes my opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta -- have focused their energy on helping the wealthiest Americans at the expense of the middle class, and on Election Day, we're going to put a stop to it.

We need to win this election, it may be the most important one in our lifetime. I want to go back to the Senate to keep fighting for the Americans that the Trump administration has left behind, to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security and to expand -- not take away -- access to affordable health care. But I can't do that without your help, and that's why I'm emailing you today.

I've been going over the budget with my campaign manager, and she told me that we need to raise another $25,000 online before midnight tomorrow to stay on track to win. If grassroots supporters like you come together to give $5 or whatever you can, I know we can meet that goal.

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180929_fr2_v1s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks, as always, for your support. On to victory.

Bob [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180929_fr2_v1s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? name: Tom Wolf
subject: speaking to you directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hi there,

I wanted to speak to you directly about something. It's about where your $5 and $10 donations go.

My opponent Scott Wagner gets his donations from PACs and special interest groups. Only 2.4% of his donations were $250 or less.

And he's turned around, and lost $600,000 of those donations over the past three months through failed investments.

Political scholars can't even recall any other candidate doing something so irresponsible.

Pennsylvanians don't deserve a leader who will gamble with their hard earned money. Pennsylvanians deserve a leader who is transparent and who they can trust on every issue.

I'm fighting to do what's best for every day Pennsylvanians, not my own pocketbook.

**[So I'm asking, can you please chip in $5 now to help keep our campaign moving forward in this final stretch?](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-wagner-donations?gpsid=14_50_3971&refcode=em18_180929_Wagdon_fnd_clq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_180929_Wagdon_fnd_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=13+-+So+Irsquom+asking+can+you+please+chip+in")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Wagner-Is-Risky](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-wagner-donations?gpsid=14_50_3971&refcode=em18_180929_Wagdon_fnd_clq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_180929_Wagdon_fnd_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=14+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomWagnerIsRisky")**

Thank you,

Tom

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Less than 48 hours left...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet tomorrow.

This is the first and only quarterly FEC report I will file against Libertarian Gary Johnson before the election. Read more below on what progress could be lost if I'm defeated this year, or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grid and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate last month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico. **The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**[DONATE $29 NOW>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")**
**And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am fighting to protect them.** I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has Gary Johnson, Republicans, and super PACs worried.

**Tomorrow is the last quarterly FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the first time since Johnson challenged me. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't be caught off guard.**

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To report our strongest FEC numbers yet, our new budget goal is to raise $55,830 before our Sunday deadline. All this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme opponents defeats me in November. Will you contribute now and help us close our budget gap before we must publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")** Thank you for standing with me,

Martin

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b797/43d8135f/66863363/510063f1/366942040/VEsO/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b797/43d8135f/66863363/510063f0/366942040/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b797/43d8135f/66863363/510063f3/366942040/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b797/43d8135f/66863363/510063f2/366942040/VEsHBA/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b797/43d8135f/66863363/510063f5/366942040/VEsHBw/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_2_10").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

body:
You might be wondering, will my $5 actually matter in this race, with all the Super PAC spending and the expensive TV ads?
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ef5/1a8421e1/19a2b320d/4921d81d/50220452/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

But you might be wondering,_ will my $5 actually matter in this race, with all the Super PAC spending and the expensive TV ads?_ And let me tell you: Yes, yes it will. name: Christina Amestoy, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: re: Steve needs our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Friend,

Did you see Senator Catherine Cortez Masto's note?

Our crucial end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up tomorrow, and she said it best: This race could very well come down to how much support we can give him before September 30th.

**[Will you donate $5 or more to help Steve Sisolak hit his goal before tomorrow night?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/ULombSPKkANimk0gC9heU2eROoEerL3v1sLrZtbG618=?gpsid=37_57_4042&refcode=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thank you,

Christina Amestoy
Communications Director
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/ULombSPKkANimk0gC9heU2eROoEerL3v1sLrZtbG618=?gpsid=37_57_4042&refcode=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Catherine Cortez Masto <info@stevesisolak.com>
Date: Fri, Sep 28, 2018
Subject: Steve needs our help
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/ULombSPKkANimk0gC9heU2eROoEerL3v1sLrZtbG618=?gpsid=37_57_4042&refcode=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_LG_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_LG_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Friend,

As a former attorney general myself, I know a thing or two about what it takes to actually represent Nevada's interests. That's why I know this: Adam Laxalt is failing to do his job.

Over and over, Laxalt has misused his office to put special interests ahead of hard-working Nevadans. Connect the dots: Laxalt has accepted more Koch money than any other candidate running for governor, while signing Nevada onto as many conveniently Koch-supported lawsuits as possible. It's pretty clear where his loyalties lie, and as governor, he would put his donors first and Nevadans last.

Remember my campaign? Outside special interest groups poured in nearly $50 million to tip the scales in our race. But with help from grassroots supporters like you, friend, we did it. I know we can do the same for Steve, but only if you step up right now to help get it done.

**[So, I'm asking you - Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more today to help Steve hit his $50,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/ULombSPKkANimk0gC9heU2eROoEerL3v1sLrZtbG618=?gpsid=37_57_4042&refcode=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_L2_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_L2_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Steve is facing a major fundraising deadline on Sunday -- his biggest yet. And I'm afraid that if Steve doesn't meet this cannot-miss goal, we may lose our chance at the governor's office. Adam Laxalt is the last person we need in power. But if we come together today, we can stop him.

**[Please donate to help Steve meet his goal before this Sunday's deadline. This race could very well come down to how much support we can give him before September 30th. Can you help Steve cross the finish line come November by stepping up and giving $5 or more today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/ULombSPKkANimk0gC9heU2eROoEerL3v1sLrZtbG618=?gpsid=37_57_4042&refcode=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_L3_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_L3_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

It will be because of a grassroots team like this one that we will send Steve to the governor's office. Thank you for everything you do.

_¡ La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine Cortez Masto
U.S. Senator for Nevada

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/ULombSPKkANimk0gC9heU2eROoEerL3v1sLrZtbG618=?gpsid=37_57_4042&refcode=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_B2_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180929_EOQ9mk_B2_fnd_gq_nopn__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
---

Friends for Steve Sisolak
P.O. Box 850
Las Vegas NV 89125 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/tesTy3RPwUDjFSzJV1qYvWEA-61pp2BnsAMspdkuw1E=/raD0JSzOHgCJsOIS6A0bUA4bn6TuD6YoQFmHpf_yS-I=).

clean_body: Peter - Our message is making a real difference. But there is a lot more work to do | | Peter - we're quickly approaching Sunday's fundraising deadline and . On Wednesday, I called for a delay on the vote to allow time for an investigation into the serious accusations against Judge Kavanaugh. I am relieved to see that Senate Republicans have agreed to give this the attention it deserves. Our message is making a real difference. But there is a lot more work to do. Peter - the funds we raise from these emails go directly into our ability to get this message, and a broader message about returning civility and decency to our politics. As a nation, we have some huge challenges before us and we'll only overcome them by working together. Enough is enough with the partisan division. Thanks for all that you're doing! -John Kasich "Facebook" "Twitter" "Web Site" "Instagram" "YouTube" Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: how we turn grassroots strength into a win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
We still have work to do to win this toss-up race. We must keep knocking doors, we must register more voters, and we must get our supporters to the polls on Election Day.
| | Peter, I hope you can take a moment to read Paul Begala's kind note below. Few people have as much experience in politics as he does -- and he is right that we still have work to do to win this toss-up race. We must keep knocking doors, we must register more voters, and we must get our supporters to the polls on Election Day. This week, we got some very welcome news -- that this race has become even more competitive, to the point that it is now a tie. Our campaign also ranked among the top races in the country for grassroots fundraising. **But we cannot stop there.** [**The final fundraising quarter of the campaign ends tomorrow at midnight, and my team is working hard to have a strong showing -- so any support you can lend us before then would be much appreciated.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kvkKIqpxWGlDOSOOR8gLciRk3IY_ZuGrBhXZljuDW9Q=/tKrxIBJlkkCdfFr9kActvzLyEqPU-AYwnxNfDbecmJ0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Paul Begala Sent: Sat, Sep 29, 8:46 AM Subject: how we turn grassroots strength into a win Friends, There's been a lot of talk this year about Democrats' growing strength ahead of the midterm elections. Now, in my years in politics and my years working in the White House, I've seen elections come and go. And there is no doubt that we have the edge, with grassroots energy sky-high and polls showing that swing voters want new leaders. **But we can 't just count on this edge becoming an automatic win in November.** We have to work to turn our early grassroots strength into victory, and the way we'll do it -- _the way we 'll take back the House_ \-- is by supporting the amazing candidates we have running across the country. One such candidate is Abigail Spanberger -- an impressive former CIA officer who has built an incredible grassroots campaign here in Central Virginia. [**Friends, can you make a donation today, ahead of Abigail 's approaching end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, so we can turn this grassroots strength into a win?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kvkKIqpxWGlDOSOOR8gLciRk3IY_ZuGrBhXZljuDW9Q=/tKrxIBJlkkCdfFr9kActvzLyEqPU-AYwnxNfDbecmJ0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This is a toss-up race. We will win the House in November in districts like this one, with candidates like Abigail, and she needs our support in this campaign's final stretch. [**So, chip in if you can -- you 'll make a difference.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kvkKIqpxWGlDOSOOR8gLciRk3IY_ZuGrBhXZljuDW9Q=/tKrxIBJlkkCdfFr9kActvzLyEqPU-AYwnxNfDbecmJ0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Paul Begala [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kvkKIqpxWGlDOSOOR8gLciRk3IY_ZuGrBhXZljuDW9Q=/tKrxIBJlkkCdfFr9kActvzLyEqPU-AYwnxNfDbecmJ0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kvkKIqpxWGlDOSOOR8gLciRk3IY_ZuGrBhXZljuDW9Q=/tKrxIBJlkkCdfFr9kActvzLyEqPU-AYwnxNfDbecmJ0=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/kvkKIqpxWGlDOSOOR8gLciRk3IY_ZuGrBhXZljuDW9Q=/JMOH9UQtQ_N3FNVXwP2eR7Sw4cckIjdEzlPVTiNfQiw=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I believe in you.
body:
|
---

| | | Friends - Here's the truth: We are in for a tough fight these next five weeks. National Republicans will do and spend whatever it takes to beat us. But I believe in you. I believe that together, we can accomplish amazing things and do what many consider impossible. I know how "impossible" ends, and I believe that if we are all willing to act, Georgia is going to elect the daughter of a shipyard worker and a librarian as the first Black woman governor in our nation's history. But I cannot get there alone. I need you with me. And that is why I have to ask: **[Can you make a $3 donation to my campaign before tomorrow's midnight fundraising deadline?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa84b/34a064cc/f6027a6/70d86fe/4007528690/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTI5MTguMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-sept-eoq?refcode=IE092918.2-full")** Right now, this campaign is on the brink of accomplishing what no one expected of us. And when we succeed, we will inspire the next generation of leaders to make their own change, to strive for the "impossible." Are you with me? Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa84b/34a064cc/f6027a6/70d86fe/4007528690/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTI5MTguMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-sept-eoq?refcode=IE092918.2-full")**

* * *

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-447
Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Tori Taylor
subject: I want a win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | We've had some huge successes this month:
* A new poll shows **Kathy ahead of Rep. Ted Budd.**
* _FiveThirtyEight_ AND the _Cook Political Report_ have both **upgraded this race to a "Toss-Up"**
* **We're only $6,000 away from reaching our $65,000 FEC Quarter goal.**

**We have 32 hours to reach this goal.[Will you rush in a contribution before midnight tomorrow?](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427970/e3b7d3/5d3c89c0/25554964/1370405048/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180929am?refcode=kme180929am_m&recurring=true") ** Look, I know it's the weekend. I know you'd probably rather be doing almost anything other than reading another message asking you for money. **But look how far your support has gotten us.** Everyone thought Rep. Ted Budd couldn't be beat. Everyone thought his roots with the big money special interests in Washington ran so deep, no one could make this race competitive, let alone a toss-up. And that's exactly what we've done. But I want more. I want a win on Election Day -- and we've got a plan to get there. But executing that plan takes resources, and our resources come from people like you, not corporate special interests. [**Rush in a contribution. Get us to this goal. And let's take this race from a "toss-up" to a WIN on Election Day.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427970/e3b7d3/5d3c89c0/25554964/1370405048/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180929am?refcode=kme180929am_m&recurring=true") Thanks! Tori Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: I'm looking out for my constituents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
I need your help to flip the House so we can stop the policies that are hurting Californians [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Peter, I was elected to look out for my constituents. And when I see House Republicans continue to push their tax plan that targets my constituents in order to pay for corporate handouts, I get angry.

**Yesterday, the House voted to make last year 's GOP tax scam permanent.** Republicans doubled down on severely limiting state and local income tax deductions -- meaning that middle-class Californians could have to pay _more_ in taxes.

And this is on top of the harmful cuts that Republicans could make to Medicare and Social Security!

**[You can help me fight to stop these dangerous plans by donating to my effort to take back the House. Will you help me raise another $2,189 by Sunday's public reporting deadline?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $10](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f8/4ac3d62d/6a25da2f/1ce28aff/4242390298/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM")**
**[Express Donate: $25](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f8/4ac3d62d/6a25da2f/1ce28afc/4242390298/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM")**
**[Express Donate: $50](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f8/4ac3d62d/6a25da2f/1ce28afd/4242390298/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM")**
**[Express Donate: $100](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366f8/4ac3d62d/6a25da2f/1ce28af2/4242390298/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM")**
**[Or, donate another amount](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM&&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I'll never stop fighting to give Californians a fair shake. I know that we can unite behind common-sense, forward-thinking plans that offer relief to middle-class families, give our workers fair wages, and keep critical public programs funded.

**[Are you with me, Peter?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thank you!

Linda

**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180929_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

body:
Peter -- Sorry to be emailing on a Saturday night, so I'll get right to the point: we're about 24 hours out from the final FEC deadline of the election, and we're not where we need to be.

I can't overstate the importance of this midterm election. What happens in 38 days will decide the direction our country will take over the next two years, and frankly, we just can't afford another term of a Trump rubber stamp Congress.

Please, dig deep and give whatever you can to help us support Democrats fighting back: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept2018**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VWxeekL8B2xO-JzyB5tPbDf5aMotTlXOVXF9sSlaI4A=/TxuykFkIrhA0vhZW55QqbYpYR9DWzOu6PXzhEWRwLT0=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180929_3_6&amount=25.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)

Mike

name: Terry McAuliffe

body:
| | Derek,

**We 've got a real shot at taking back the House and Senate, and I think that shot runs through Virginia -- I really do.**
* We can change a lot in a year with a good campaign program and great candidates. Just look at the upsets we pulled last year and what it allowed us to do: expand Medicaid for Virginians.

**You know what else we have a shot at doing? Hitting Tim 's goal this month.**
* It's not an easy endeavor: $100,000 in the last week of September (when everyone else is fundraising too) is ambitious. But Tim and the rest of the Democrats in Virginia need these resources if they're going to pull off a feat even bigger than last year's -- so let's take this shot.

**Derek, Tim 's deadline is [tomorrow -- _yes, tomorrow._](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1059/3e0906/71de92e4/3e364e37/2203862508/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180929_2_FR_TM_Terry-surrogate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+tomorrow++yes+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180929_2_FR_TM_Terry-surrogate-LDND&source=20180929_2_FR_TM_Terry-surrogate-LDND") And he still needs $15,000. body:
|
---

| | | We'll keep this quick. **Here are the top three reasons you need to _[contribute to Martin's Senate campaign](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+contribute+to+Martinrsquos+Senate+campai&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_3_11&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_3_11&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180929_3_11")_ before Sunday's Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline:**

* **This is the FIRST FEC report since Libertarian Gary Johnson launched his last-minute Senate bid** \-- meaning Martin and Johnson's numbers will be compared side-by-side.

* **This is the FINAL quarterly FEC report before early voting in New Mexico** and we can't afford to scale back our get-out-the-vote plan.

* This is a critical year for Senate Democrats, and **losing Martin means we lose any chance at taking back the Senate.**

**_[There's still time to help Martin. Contribute here so we reach our FEC budget goal before midnight tomorrow >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. body:

subject: Trump just attacked Sherrod online
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
---
| | This morning, Sherrod emailed you about President Trump wanting him to lose his job. Sherrod wasn't kidding. Trump _JUST_ attacked Sherrod online and urged his supporters to vote for Sherrod's opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. [**Peter, we urgently need to ramp up our online efforts to spread Sherrod 's message far and wide. Can you rush in $5, $10, or our average online contribution of $26? ALL contributions will be quadruple-matched.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe30/4462dc26/791e84ed/201a13c0/1169241023/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm3?refcode=sbe180929pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Our digital team is getting to work on fighting back online, but we need your help to ramp up our efforts -- and fast. | | | [CHIP IN](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe30/4462dc26/791e84ed/201a13c0/1169241023/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm3?refcode=sbe180929pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

Thank you,
Catherine
Catherine Gabel
Sherrod's Digital Director
_\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: I want to keep my job Peter_
---
**President Trump wants me to lose my job as your Senator.** He and Vice President Pence are all-in for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci.
**Special interests want me to lose my job as your Senator.** They've put their money where their mouth is and are spending for my opponent.
**_And it looks like their attempts are working._** Recent polling shows this is a four-point race.
[**To make matters worse, we 're behind on our end-of-quarter goal. That's why I'm personally asking for you to contribute.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe30/4462dc26/791e84ed/201a13c0/1169241023/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm3?refcode=sbe180929pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe30/4462dc26/791e84ed/201a13c7/1169241023/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0zIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm3?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180929pm3_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**

[**Right now, a group of donors will QUADRUPLE-match donations. If you donate $5, it 'll count as $20.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe30/4462dc26/791e84ed/201a13c0/1169241023/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm3?refcode=sbe180929pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

[**We can 't miss our FEC goal. We can't afford to let this match program pass. And we can't lose this Senate seat.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe30/4462dc26/791e84ed/201a13c0/1169241023/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI5cG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180929pm3?refcode=sbe180929pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

Sherrod

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Jay's asking [deadline]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We must hit our September goal.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d2/2112829959/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&utm_campaign=eom-5&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Governor Inslee wouldn't ask if it wasn't important. Neither would I. But this is important -- with weeks before ballots drop **we are behind our critical deadline goal, and we need to catch up.** Democrats are counting on a blue wave and that's a mistake -- we can't rest on our laurels. We must invest in a winning movement and we must do it now. With ballots dropping in just a few weeks, we must build our progressive movement immediately. **We can't wait until the last moment.** [**Right now, we still need to bring $2,785 in the door before midnight on Sunday if we're going to hit our goal. Can you help?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d2/2112829959/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&utm_campaign=eom-5&utm_medium=ema") [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d2/2112829959/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&utm_campaign=eom-5&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Tracy \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Friday, Sept 28, 2018
Subject: Washington's future hangs in the balance Friend, Let me put it on the line:**We're six weeks out from Election Day, and the stakes have never been higher.** Up and down the ballot, _exceptional Democrats are running strong races across Washington._ They're taking on issues like health care, education, a woman's right to choose, the environment, infrastructure, expanding broadband access for rural communities, and growing opportunities for hardworking Washingtonians. But Republicans, with help from their national counterparts and dark money groups, are pumping huge amounts into our state in an effort to bring the disastrous policies of Donald Trump here. [**Friend, we must fight for our values against Republican dark money and special interest lobbyists. We must build a progressive movement that can take on the worst that they throw at us. And to do that, we need to raise $15,000 by midnight on Sunday.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d2/2112829959/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&utm_campaign=eom-5&utm_medium=ema") Here in Washington, there's an extra urgency to our cause. Ballots will be mailed to every voter on October 19. We don't have the luxury of waiting to reach voters until we're closer to Election Day. Washingtonians will begin making up their minds in just three weeks about the candidates they plan to vote for. Our movement for change must take off, right here and right now. Friend, with the stakes so high, we're working hard to make sure Democrats vote in record numbers this year. Up and down the ballot, we need to send a clear signal that Washingtonians are rejecting extremist policies fostering fear, hate, and division. **And to do that, we need to make sure our progressive movement is strong.** [**Will you pitch in right now to help me build our progressive movement over the next six weeks?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d2/2112829959/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&utm_campaign=eom-5&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d2/2112829959/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-5&utm_campaign=eom-5&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf12/2f5ea88d/751476f8/2cbc77d1/2112829959/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: betofortexas.com
subject: personal video message from Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Our final, official fundraising deadline is Sunday at midnight -- the most
important deadline we’ve faced so far. Beto recorded a personal message
(with a request). [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1001&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY ]Watch it here, then chip in
$3
before the FEC deadline.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1002&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY ]Beto for Texas

We want to raise $5 million by the end of Sunday. What we raise will
determine our budget for the last push before early voting begins -- and
our opponents and the media will look at the numbers we report as a
demonstration of the level of support for our campaign.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1021&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY ]Can Beto count on you to contribute
$3
before Sunday at midnight so we can add your numbers to our fundraising
report?

[22]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1022&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY ]Contribute
$3
»

Right now, national headlines are raining in with positive, inspiring
reporting on our campaign. Our mighty volunteer network continues to grow
in epic proportions. We’re launching the largest ‘get out the vote’ effort
that’s ever been attempted in Texas. This is the kind of ambition it will
take to unseat Ted Cruz and elect Beto.

We’ve already built historic momentum, but our hardest work is still ahead
of us. Our opponent has PACs, Super PACs and dark money groups at his
back. If we don’t give this final stretch everything we’ve got, all of our
progress will be in jeopardy.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1023&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY ]Your contribution before midnight on Sunday is a vital part of our
most critical efforts so far. Please give whatever you can afford now.

Thank you for everything you’ve already given -- your time, energy, and
resources. We are blown away by the outpouring of support we’ve seen.
Thank you for believing in Beto, and in the future that we can build,
together.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180929&t=1024&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180929footer&t=1025&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=13931%2E444211%2E7nJ8sY

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:
The books close on the Q3 fundraising quarter tomorrow at midnight, and then we'll report our numbers to the FEC. You're a very important member of Team O'Halleran, so I want to share an update on our
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633efb/1a8421e1/19a23c870/49218711/189904941/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
_It 's officially crunch time, team._ The books close on the Q3 fundraising quarter _**tomorrow at midnight,**_ and then we'll report our numbers to the FEC. **Then they will go PUBLIC and the far-right groups in D.C. will decide whether to pour more money into our race. (You can chip in here to make sure we have a strong showing.)** You're a very important member of Team O'Halleran, so I want to share an update on our progress as we approach this important deadline: **Update for you** **Deadline: TomorrowUpdate for you** **Left to Online Goal: $4,101** [**Rush a donation to push us over the edge >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Remember: Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House and we need to keep AZ-01 blue in November to win the majority. We can't leave anything on the table in this race, and that means we need to _crush this goal tomorrow._ [**CHIP IN >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.29_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. **_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: [URGENT] Democrat Donnelly Opposes Kavanaugh, Reply by Midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Democrat Joe Donnelly caved.Instead of standing with the Hoosiers he was elected to serve, Democrat Donnelly chose to march to Chuck Schumer... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/urgentdonnellykavanaugh?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a04e5157fe&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friends,

Democrat Joe Donnelly caved.

**Instead of standing with the Hoosiers he was elected to serve, Democrat Donnelly chose to march to Chuck Schumer's obstructionist orders in announcing his opposition to Judge Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.**

When Democrats realized they couldn't take down Judge Kavanaugh on his merits, they created a media circus around uncorroborated allegations. And Democrat Joe Donnelly fell for their ploy. For years, he's pretended to be a moderate. And for the past several months, he's even pretended to be a supporter of President Donald Trump's agenda. But we knew the truth - and yesterday proved our case. Democrat Donnelly is not a moderate nor a supporter of President Trump... Democrat Donnelly is a Democrat.

When it matters most, when all the chips are on the table and it's all on the line - like it is with Judge Kavanaugh's upcoming confirmation vote - Democrat Donnelly doesn't stand with you, he stands with Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, Barack Obama and Bernie Sanders.

**Would you be willing****[to chip in $25, $50, $100, $250 or more](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a4d5b5ec3&e=1acd9bb3d6)****to send a message to Democrat Joe Donnelly that his days in the Senate are numbered?**

---
| [SEND DEMOCRAT DONNELLY A MESSAGE!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=255509c624&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SEND DEMOCRAT DONNELLY A MESSAGE!")
---
| Democrat Joe Donnelly proved once again that he's part of the problem in Washington, D.C. He could have supported Judge Kavanaugh, but instead he chose to shun Hoosiers and join with Chuck Schumer and his fellow Democrat obstructionists in an attempt to take down this highly-qualified, well-respected nominee. Democrat Donnelly is showing that he doesn't work for us; he works for his Democrat bosses who are against putting another constitutional conservative on Supreme Court.

**[Click here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ed9c78afd&e=1acd9bb3d6) to make an immediate URGENT contribution of ****[$25, $50, $100, $250 or more](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=91168df283&e=1acd9bb3d6)****to send a message to Democrat Joe Donnelly that you stand with President Trump AND with Judge Kavanaugh.**

As our next United States Senator, Mike Braun, said:

_“This entire process has been an embarrassment to our democracy as Hoosiers watched firsthand how Senator Donnelly’s liberal colleagues used uncorroborated allegations to create a media circus designed to smear and destroy Judge Kavanaugh’s reputation. Donnelly’s decision to oppose President Trump’s highly qualified nominee is a grave mistake, but proves he is more concerned with standing with his liberal Democrat leaders than standing for Hoosiers. I continue to strongly support Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court.” _

**_Democrat Donnelly is simply just another Democrat who is focused more on obstructing President Trump's agenda, and destroying our nation's progress.__ _** Democrat Donnelly may plan to vote against Judge Kavanaugh, but he should also be prepared for the wave of Hoosiers who now plan to vote against him in November.

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Add your name if you agree we should not limit this FBI investigation to one week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
The FBI should have whatever time they need to investigate.
#

Sisters and Brothers,
Let me begin by saying something that should be clear to everyone:
What Dr. Christine Blasey Ford did earlier this week — coming forward as a survivor of sexual assault and sharing her story with the entire nation, knowing full well her character would be under attack and her family’s safety threatened — demonstrated a kind of courage and patriotism that is quite rare.
And then to agree to re-live that trauma once again by participating in an FBI investigation and the continued national spotlight that will come with it is nothing short of heroic.
Let me be clear: Brett Kavanaugh would push this Supreme Court even further to an extreme right wing that desperately wants to gut a woman’s right to choose, further erode voting rights, and make it easier and easier for Wall Street and the billionaire class to buy our elections. Kavanaugh has been dangerous from the beginning, and I have opposed him right from the start.
Dr. Blasey Ford’s experience cannot and must not be ignored, and she deserves a full, serious FBI investigation. It should not be limited to one week. The FBI should have a reasonable time to do its job well.
And America deserves the same.
We are talking about a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. There is no reason to rush this investigation. None. And let me say something else that I believe many of my colleagues in the Senate agree with, but few would say aloud:
It is very likely that Brett Kavanaugh lied to the Senate repeatedly and under oath during these confirmation hearings and in previous ones as well.
He likely lied about whether or not he used stolen materials while working in the White House to help advance nominees made by President George W. Bush. And anyone watching this last week can tell he was likely lying, repeatedly, about his time in high school and college.
The FBI should have the time to investigate that, as well. The American people deserve no less.
So that is my call today, and I hope you will join me in making your voice heard.
**[Sign my petition: Tell Congress you believe the FBI should have the time it needs to conduct a full and thorough investigation into Brett Kavanaugh’s repeated lies before the United States Senate.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-fbi-petition?source=em180929-full&t=1&akid=172%2E150750%2EIQ-wlJ)**
Now I know a few of my friends on both sides of the aisle may say that they are torn or conflicted about this nomination. Maybe they are a bit worried about what will happen in an election or among their party’s base if they vote no or call for a longer investigation.
But I know their fear must be nothing compared to the fear Dr. Ford felt as she raised her right hand and stared at a panel of some of the most powerful men in the nation who worked overtime in the days before to cast doubt on her story.
And what I would ask of them is to summon just a fraction of the courage Dr. Ford showed this week.
They should do what’s right for the nation and push for a full examination of Brett Kavanaugh’s repeated lies to the Senate.
Add your name if you agree:
**[Sign my petition: Tell Congress you believe the FBI should have the time it needs to conduct a full and thorough investigation into Brett Kavanaugh’s repeated lies before the United States Senate.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-fbi-petition?source=em180929-full&t=2&akid=172%2E150750%2EIQ-wlJ)**
Thank you for making your voice heard.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-fbi-petition?source=em180929-full&t=3&akid=172%2E150750%2EIQ-wlJ)****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=172%2E150750%2EIQ-wlJ). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&akid=172%2E150750%2EIQ-wlJ).
